description_long: This nightstand features a warm, light wood finish and a rectangular structure with three spacious drawers, each fitted with a square metallic handle. The top surface is flat and sturdy, supporting a large, octagonal-framed mirror that rises vertically from the back edge. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain visible throughout, and the legs are short and slightly flared, providing stable support. The drawers are evenly spaced and likely offer ample storage for small personal items. The mirror's frame matches the wood of the nightstand, creating a cohesive and classic appearance. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, giving the piece a simple, functional, and urban-friendly design.
description: A light wood nightstand with three drawers, square metal handles, and an attached octagonal mirror. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with square metal handles and the attached octagonal mirror.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the nightstand and the thickness of the mirror frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back and the full height of the mirror.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the side panel and mirror profile.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: against a wall, beside a bed or seating area
